spec_match.rationale: The demo effectively showcases using image(<color>) across three distinct CSS slots (background-image, list-style-image, and custom dot decoration) driven by standard CSS.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive control with three separate live color pickers, real-time card updating, and clean generated CSS output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb is fully aligned with the theme builder concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates multiple properties simultaneously and provides a fallback pattern for the custom category dot.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Strong adherence to the design system, using standard paper background and dark text values.

openQuestions.title: Remove unused dead code
openQuestions.detail: The `hsl(hex)` function defined in the `<script>` block (lines 254-259) is unused in the code and actually returns an `rgb()` string instead of HSL. It should be removed to keep the demo code clean.

summary: A highly interactive and effective demo that showcases theme propagation using image(). The live controls are excellent. The code contains a minor piece of unused dead code (an unused function incorrectly named hsl) that should be cleaned up.
